prompt_summary: 根据医院门口雨夜重逢分镜，生成2条适合AI绘图的电影感写实Prompt，保持雨夜场景、林晚和顾沉角色外观、冷色车灯光影和压抑对峙情绪一致。

items.source_visual_description: 林晚撑着黑伞站在医院门口台阶边，雨水打湿地面。
items.positive_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, rainy night at a hospital entrance, a young woman in a dark dress holding a black umbrella standing on the stone steps, raindrops falling on the wet ground creating ripples, reflections of fluorescent lights on puddles, solitary and tense atmosphere, medium shot, slight low angle, detailed rain-soaked pavement, realistic textures, dramatic cold lighting
items.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, distorted face, watermark, text, logo, overexposed, duplicate people, cartoon, anime style
items.camera_language: 中景，轻微低角度机位，雨幕作为前景，强调林晚独自撑伞等待的孤独感。
items.lighting: 冷色雨夜环境光，荧光灯和医院灯光在湿地形成倒影，营造压抑氛围。
items.color_palette: 蓝灰冷色为主，医院灯光在雨中泛出白光。
items.character_consistency: 林晚穿深色连衣裙，撑黑色伞，表情克制但内心紧张，外貌气质保持一致。
items.environment: 雨夜医院门口，台阶湿滑，医院玻璃门反射灯光，地面有明显水痕。
items.composition: 竖幅构图，林晚位于画面中上部偏右，伞和身影形成视觉重心，雨幕和光线营造空间层次。
items.model_hint: general image model, prioritize realistic cinematic details, rain effects, and proper human anatomy
items.notes: 保持林晚的外观连续性，不要改变黑伞和医院门口的场景设定。

items.source_visual_description: 顾沉从黑色轿车里下来，两人在车灯和雨幕中对视。
items.positive_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, rainy night at a hospital entrance, a young man in a dark coat stepping out of a black sedan car, the two characters staring at each other through heavy rain, cold car headlights casting sharp white beams across wet pavement, tense confrontation mood, medium shot, eye-level angle, rain particles visible in the light beams, realistic faces showing restrained emotions, dramatic contrast lighting
items.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, distorted face, watermark, text, logo, overexposed, duplicate people, cartoon, anime style
items.camera_language: 中景，平视机位，雨幕和车灯作为前景框架，两人隔着台阶和光影对峙。
items.lighting: 冷色车灯白光与雨夜环境光交错，湿地强反光强化紧张对峙氛围。
items.color_palette: 蓝灰冷色为主，车灯白光点缀，少量暗红尾灯。
items.character_consistency: 顾沉穿深色外套，外观与前镜连续；林晚撑黑伞、穿深色裙，外观与前镜保持一致。
items.environment: 雨夜医院门口，黑色轿车停在台阶边，湿滑地面反射车灯光束，雨幕中两人对峙。
items.composition: 竖幅构图，两人分居画面两侧，车灯光束和雨幕形成视觉分隔和紧张张力。
items.model_hint: general image model, prioritize realistic cinematic details, proper human anatomy, and dramatic light interaction
items.notes: 保持顾沉和林晚的外观连续性，继续使用雨夜医院门口场景和车灯光影设定。
